column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol provide free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the hotel?
column3: Yes, complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi is available in all guestrooms and public areas of the hotel.

column2: Is the front desk at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol staffed 24 hours a day?
column3: Yes, the property operates a fully staffed reception desk 24 hours a day for guest assistance.

column2: What are the standard check-in and check-out times at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Check-in begins at 15:00, and check-out is required by 11:00 on the day of departure.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer on-site parking, and what is the daily fee?
column3: The hotel provides underground on-site parking, subject to availability, at a cost of €15 per day.

column2: Is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol a completely non-smoking property?
column3: Yes, the hotel is designated non-smoking throughout, with smoking permitted only in signed outdoor areas.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have accessible rooms or facilities for guests with reduced mobility?
column3: Yes, adapted guestrooms, lifts and step-free public areas are available for guests with reduced mobility.

column2: How many guest rooms are there at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offers a total of 398 contemporary guest rooms.

column2: Does the team at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol speak multiple languages?
column3: Yes, multilingual staff members speak Spanish, English and other major European languages for guest convenience.

column2: What room categories can guests choose from at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Room categories include Comfort, Superior Side Sea View, Deluxe Sea View, Deluxe Sea View Triple, Superior Side Sea View Triple and Family Rooms.

column2: Are all rooms at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol equipped with air-conditioning and heating?
column3: Yes, every guest room features individually controlled air-conditioning and heating for year-round comfort.

column2: Do accommodations at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol feature a private balcony or terrace?
column3: Yes, all guestrooms include a furnished balcony or terrace overlooking the city or the Mediterranean.

column2: Is an in-room safe available in guestrooms at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, each room contains a personal safe; a small daily surcharge may apply.

column2: Are cribs or infant beds available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: No, cribs or infant beds are not provided by the hotel.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol provide daily housekeeping service?
column3: Yes, daily housekeeping refreshes rooms, makes beds and replenishes amenities for staying guests.

column2: Is laundry or dry-cleaning service offered to guests at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, same-day laundry and dry-cleaning services can be arranged through reception.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have hypoallergenic or allergy-free rooms on request?
column3: Yes, allergy-free guestrooms with special bedding are available upon advance request.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol serve a daily buffet breakfast on site?
column3: Yes, a generous buffet breakfast is served every morning in the main restaurant.

column2: What are the breakfast hours at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Breakfast is served daily from 07:30 to 10:00.

column2: How much does the breakfast at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol cost for adults and children?
column3: Breakfast costs €15 per adult and €7.50 per child aged 2–11.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have an on-site restaurant open for lunch and dinner?
column3: Yes, the buffet restaurant is open for lunch and for dinner service each day.

column2: What are the lunch and dinner service hours at the restaurant in Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Lunch is served 13:00-15:30 and dinner 19:00-22:00 daily.

column2: Is room service available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, guests may order a selection of meals and drinks through room service during posted hours.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol feature a Sky Bar with panoramic sea views?
column3: Yes, the rooftop Sky Bar offers cocktails and panoramic views of Torremolinos and the sea.

column2: How many bars and lounges are available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Four bars and lounges are available: Lobby Bar, Pool Bar, Snack Bar and Skyline Bar.

column2: What is the minimum age required to check in at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The minimum legal age for check-in is 18 years.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol provide complimentary luggage storage before check-in or after check-out?
column3: Yes, the hotel offers free luggage storage at reception before check-in and after check-out.

column2: Are pets allowed to stay at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: No, pets are not permitted to stay at this property.

column2: Can guests request early check-in at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol, and is there a fee?
column3: Information is currently not available. [VERIFY]

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer late check-out options?
column3: Late check-out may be granted on request, subject to availability; Advantage Club members receive it free.

column2: What payment methods are accepted at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol, and is a deposit required at check-in?
column3: Major credit and debit cards are accepted; cash is not. A card pre-authorisation for incidentals is required at check-in.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer all-inclusive rate plans?
column3: Yes, optional all-inclusive packages covering buffet meals and select drinks are available when booking.

column2: What is the smoking policy at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The property is non-smoking indoors, with smoking allowed only in designated outdoor areas.

column2: How far is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol from Torremolinos Cercanías train station?
column3: The hotel is approximately 400 metres, or about a five-minute walk, from the Cercanías station.

column2: Approximately how long does it take to drive from Málaga-Costa del Sol Airport to Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The 8 km journey usually takes around 15-20 minutes by car, traffic permitting.

column2: How many minutes’ walk is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol from Bajondillo Beach?
column3: Bajondillo Beach is roughly 400 metres away, an easy five-minute walk downhill.

column2: Is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol located in the city centre of Torremolinos?
column3: Yes, the hotel stands in Torremolinos City Centre, close to Calle San Miguel and Plaza Costa del Sol.

column2: How far is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol from Aqualand Torremolinos water park?
column3: Aqualand Torremolinos is about 1.8 kilometres away, a five-minute drive or 20-minute walk.

column2: What is the walking distance from Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol to Calle San Miguel shopping street?
column3: Calle San Miguel starts roughly 100 metres from the hotel, less than a two-minute walk.

column2: Which exit on the A-7 motorway is closest to Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Information is currently not available. [VERIFY]

column2: Does the train from Torremolinos station provide a direct link to Málaga city centre near Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, Cercanías line C1 trains run directly from Torremolinos to Málaga Centro-Alameda station. [VERIFY]

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol feature a rooftop pool with panoramic views?
column3: Yes, a seasonal rooftop pool offers sun-loungers and sweeping Mediterranean panoramas.

column2: Is there an indoor heated pool at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, guests can enjoy a heated indoor pool for year-round swimming.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol provide a separate children’s pool?
column3: Yes, a dedicated shallow children’s pool is available beside the main outdoor pool.

column2: Is there a fitness centre or gym at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, a fully equipped gym with cardio and strength machines is open to guests.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer a sauna or wellness area for guests?
column3: Yes, the wellness area includes a traditional sauna for relaxation.

column2: Is the outdoor pool at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol open seasonally, and during which months?
column3: The outdoor pool operates seasonally from April through October, weather permitting.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have an arcade or games room with table tennis and billiards?
column3: Yes, the hotel’s games room features table tennis tables and billiards cues.

column2: Are there evening entertainment options such as live piano music at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, live piano sessions and other light evening entertainment are hosted in selected bars.
